name: Full/Queen Linen Bed Skirt Gray - Casaluna™
description:
Enhance the look of your sleeping quarter with this Full/Queen Linen Bedskirt from Casaluna™. Designed in a charming and versatile gray shade, this full/queen bedskirt provides 15 inches of drop at the foot to create a neat look and also protect against the accumulation of dust under the bed. This bedskirt is woven from linen-cotton fabric to create a perfect spot to relax and sleep in luxury and style, while the machine-washable construction simplifies cleaning.

Casaluna™: Where calm and comfort are naturally at home.
